title: Goblin Tricks destroys one field magic

card.rawText: Play this card from your hand when your opponent plays a magic card. Negate the card effect and send it to the cemetery or destroy 1 magic card on the field.

plan.title: Goblin Tricks destroys one field magic
plan.summary: Respond to opponent magic with Goblin Tricks, choose the destroy branch, and verify a field magic card is destroyed.

notes: Goblin Tricks is in player_1 hand. Player_2 plays a standard magic to open the Lightning response window.
Pre-place test_magic_spd_plus4 on field as the destroy-mode target.

steps: Open Lightning response window for player_1.
Confirm the triggering magic card was not negated by this branch.

expectedAssertions.label: Triggering magic resolved its draw effect

manualVerification: Confirm UI lets the player choose between negating the triggering magic and destroying one magic on field.
riskNotes: This fixture covers the destroy-mode choice branch, not the already-covered negation branch.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
